easy.title: Easy
easy.text: No soil, no mess — just insert and grow.

steps: Insert the pod into your planter.
Enjoy a fresh harvest in weeks.

faqItems.q: Do I need any gardening experience?
faqItems.a: None at all. Just drop in a pod, add water and nutrients, and the LED runs on an automatic 16/8 cycle. The app and pod guides walk you through every step.

faqItems.q: How long until my first harvest?
faqItems.a: Most herbs and leafy greens are ready to pick in about 2–3 weeks, and keep producing for months afterwards.

faqItems.q: How much electricity does it use?
faqItems.a: Very little — the full-spectrum LED is as efficient as a couple of household bulbs, roughly a few euros per month.

faqItems.q: What can I grow in it?
faqItems.a: Basil, mint, parsley, cilantro, lettuce, arugula and more — 12 pods at once. Any HomeGarder pod fits the slots.

faqItems.q: Is it covered by a warranty?
faqItems.a: Yes — a 2-year warranty plus a 30-day money-back guarantee if it's not for you.
We ship across Bulgaria, the Balkans and the European Union, with dispatch within 24 hours.

footer.shippingNote: Free shipping over €130. Prices in EUR.
